html:
Exclusive to:

Dead Jellyfish are a fish food item in the Shipwrecked DLC. Dead Jellyfish can be obtained by murdering Jellyfish. Both Dead Jellyfish and Cooked Jellyfish can be used in the Crock Pot and count as a berry.

A Dead Jellyfish picked up off the ground or taken from a Crock Pot will shock the Character and cause 5 points of Health damage. This damage can be prevented by wearing Lightning resistant clothing, such as a Snakeskin Hat or a Snakeskin Jacket.

Cooked Jellyfish

Cooked Jellyfish are a fish food item made by cooking Dead Jellyfish on a Campfire, Fire Pit, Krissure, Star, Chiminea, or Obsidian Fire Pit. They restore nearly twice as much hunger, and take longer to spoil. They can be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes.

Dried Jellyfish

Dried Jellyfish is the product of drying Dead Jellyfish or Dead Rainbow Jellyfish on a Drying Rack for 1 Day. Other than having double the spoilage time of Cooked Jellyfish, it has extra hunger and sanity advantages from being dried.

Usage


By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

"jellyfish_dead"
“It lived a good life. Maybe.”
–Wilson, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“Won't be stingin' anyone now.”
–Willow, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“It stood no chance against Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“It was a painless death. The beast had no nervous system.”
–Wendy, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“WILL DECOMPOSITION INCREASE GELATINOUS TEXTURE?”
–WX-78, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“Mind you don't step in that.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“The life's all but drained out of it, eh?”
–Woodie, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“I like it better dead.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“Based on past experience, I should not consume this raw.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“The sea mönster rides tö Valhalla!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“It's not jelly or fish. It's also not alive.”
–Webber, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“It might still sting me.”
–Walani, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“Ohh, its petit face.”
–Warly, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“Shockin'ly dead.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“HATH DEPARTED MORTAL COIL”
–Wilba, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“Poor Blob”
–Wormwood, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
“I'll dedicate a passage to you in my memoirs.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Dead Jellyfish.
Dead Jellyfish are a fish food item in the Shipwrecked DLC. Dead Jellyfish can be obtained by murdering Jellyfish. Both Dead Jellyfish and Cooked Jellyfish can be used in the Crock Pot and count as a berry.
A Dead Jellyfish picked up off the ground or taken from a Crock Pot will shock the Character and cause 5 points of Health damage. This damage can be prevented by wearing Lightning resistant clothing, such as a Snakeskin Hat or a Snakeskin Jacket.

Miscellaneous
"jellyfish_cooked"
“It's all wriggly.”
–Wilson, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“It actually looks edible.”
–Willow, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“Jelly looks tasty now.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“It's sort of like gelatin.”
–Wendy, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“40% REDUCTION IN GELATINOUS TEXTURE”
–WX-78, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“I have made it edible with a controlled chemical reaction.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“I think this is as edible as it gets.”
–Woodie, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“It will do, I suppose.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“Ringlets of ever increasing circumference.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“The sea mönster cööks up well!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“We hoped it would be more... solid.”
–Webber, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“I hope this doesn't sting me.”
–Walani, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“Could use sesame oil and chilis...”
–Warly, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“Shockin'ly tasty.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“FWOOSH'DED FISHIES O' SQUISHIES”
–Wilba, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“Blob hoops”
–Wormwood, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
“It's like gum. Only not tasty.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Cooked Jellyfish.
Cooked Jellyfish are a fish food item made by cooking Dead Jellyfish on a Campfire, Fire Pit, Krissure, Star, Chiminea, or Obsidian Fire Pit. They restore nearly twice as much hunger, and take longer to spoil. They can be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes.

"jellyjerky"
“I'd be a jerk not to eat this.”
–Wilson
“Looks chewy.”
–Willow
“Jerky is tough, like Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“So... tough.”
–Wendy
“IT'S ENJOYED A 75% REDUCTION IN GELATINOUS TEXTURE”
–WX-78
“What an inventive preserve.”
–Wickerbottom
“Jerky! The food of my people.”
–Woodie
“I actually don't mind this?”
–Maxwell
“Of a chewy consistency. Not unlike tar.”
–Wagstaff
“My teeth shall dö battle with yöu.”
–Wigfrid
“We'll try anything once.”
–Webber
“Looks extra chewy.”
–Walani
“Could use garlic...”
–Warly
“Who be knowin' such a thing be possible?”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS SQUISHIES MEAT”
–Wilba
“Chewy Blob”
–Wormwood
“Just as chewy as when it's not dried.”
–Wheeler
Dried Jellyfish is the product of drying Dead Jellyfish or Dead Rainbow Jellyfish on a Drying Rack for 1 Day. Other than having double the spoilage time of Cooked Jellyfish, it has extra hunger and sanity advantages from being dried.

'''Dead Jellyfish''' are a [[Fishes|fish]] [[food]] [[item]] in the ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. Dead Jellyfish can be obtained by murdering [[Jellyfish]]. Both Dead Jellyfish and Cooked Jellyfish can be used in the [[Crock Pot]] and count as a berry.

A Dead Jellyfish picked up off the ground or taken from a Crock Pot will shock the [[Character]] and cause 5 points of [[Health]] damage. This damage can be prevented by wearing [[Lightning]] resistant clothing, such as a [[Snakeskin Hat]] or a [[Snakeskin Jacket]].
